errors.unexpected: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.server: Couldn't reach the server. Check your connection and try again.
errors.auth: Authentication failed. Please sign in again.
errors.ai: The assistant ran into a problem. Please try again.
errors.accessDenied: Access is restricted for this account.

errors.emptyFile: CSV file is empty or invalid.
errors.missingColumn: CSV is missing the required "$column" column.
errors.noValidAccounts: CSV file has no valid accounts.
errors.noValidCategories: CSV file has no valid categories.
errors.noValidTransactions: CSV file has no valid transactions.
errors.noValidBudgets: CSV file has no valid budgets.
errors.accountTypeEmpty: Row $row: type column is empty. Use Conta Corrente or Cartão de Crédito.
errors.accountTypeInvalid: Row $row: invalid type "$value". Use Conta Corrente or Cartão de Crédito.
errors.accountTypeInvestment: Row $row: investment accounts cannot be imported from CSV in this version. Create them manually from the add-account screen.
errors.categoryTypeEmpty: Row $row: type column is empty. Use Receita, Despesa, Income or Expense.
errors.categoryTypeInvalid: Row $row: invalid type "$value". Use Receita, Despesa, Income or Expense.
errors.transactionTypeEmpty: Row $row: type column is empty. Use Despesa, Receita, Transferência or Pagamento.
errors.transactionTypeInvalid: Row $row: invalid type "$value". Use Despesa, Receita, Transferência or Pagamento.

accessControl.restrictedBody: Ask Guilherme to grant access for your email:

masterPanel.title: Master panel
masterPanel.masterAlreadyAllowed: The master account already has access.
masterPanel.removeEmailBody: This removes access for $email. Their existing data is kept.
masterPanel.deleteUserBody: This permanently deletes $name and all of their data. Type the email to confirm.

onboarding.step1Body: Log income and expenses effortlessly. Keep a clear view of where your money goes.
onboarding.step2Body: Just type naturally — our AI chat extracts transaction data for you automatically.
onboarding.step3Body: Beautiful charts and summaries help you understand your spending habits.

fiftyThirtyTwenty.noIncomeHeadline: Log income for this month to track the 50/30/20 rule.
fiftyThirtyTwenty.tipNeedsOver: Trim $value off needs to hit the target.
fiftyThirtyTwenty.tipWantsOver: You went $value over your wants budget this month.
fiftyThirtyTwenty.tipSavingsShortNoAccount: Create an investment account to start logging contributions.
fiftyThirtyTwenty.editTargetsHint: Set the percentage for each bucket. The three must add up to 100%.
fiftyThirtyTwenty.bucketEmpty: No expenses in this bucket this month.

transactions.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this transaction?
transactions.sequenceEditMessage: This transaction is part of a sequence. Choose whether to update only this occurrence or this and the following pending occurrences.
transactions.sequenceDeleteMessage: This transaction is part of a sequence. Choose whether to delete only this occurrence or this and the following pending occurrences.
transactions.importCsvIntroBody: Your file must follow the expected format (columns Tipo, Data, Valor, Descrição, Categoria, Conta, Conta transferência — where Tipo is Despesa/Receita/Transferência/Pagamento). Download the example to see how it works.
transactions.importPageSubtitle: Tap a row to edit · trash to remove
transactions.importEmptyTab: Nothing to import in this tab.

accounts.title: Accounts
accounts.investmentDescription: Dedicated account for contributions. Shows up as 'investment' on transfers and feeds the 50/30/20 card.
accounts.investmentYieldDisclaimer: Balance reflects only your contributions (principal). Market yield is not tracked.
accounts.name: Account Nickname
accounts.empty: No accounts. Add your first bank account or credit card.
accounts.emptySubtitle: Add your bank accounts and credit cards.
accounts.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this account?
accounts.importCsvIntroBody: Your file must follow the expected format (columns Nome, Saldo inicial, Tipo, Banco, Limite, Próximo Vencimento, Fechamento — where Tipo is Conta Corrente or Cartão de Crédito). Download the example to see how it works.
accounts.importPageSubtitle: Tap a row to edit · trash to remove
accounts.importEmptyTab: Nothing to import in this tab.
accounts.importMissingLinkPrefix: Pick a linked checking account for:

categories.title: Categories
categories.name: Category name
categories.empty: No categories. Categories will appear here.
categories.reassignPrompt: Select a category to reassign transactions to:
categories.cannotDeleteLast: Create another category before deleting this one.
categories.subcategoryAppearanceInherited: Subcategories inherit the parent category's icon and color.
categories.importCsvIntroBody: Your file must follow the expected format (columns Categoria, Subcategoria, Tipo — where Tipo is Receita/Despesa or Income/Expense). Download the example to see how it works.
categories.importPageSubtitle: Tap an item to edit · swipe trash to remove
categories.importEmptyTab: Nothing to import in this tab.
categories.bucketHint: Which group does this category fit into?
categories.incomeCountsHint: When on, income on this category feeds the monthly base (100%). Turn off for one-off receipts (reimbursements, gifts, sold goods) that would otherwise distort the breakdown.
categories.bucketHelp: Needs cover essentials (rent, groceries, transport). Wants cover discretionary (leisure, dining out). Savings is handled by transfers to investment accounts.
categories.demoteBlockedChildren: This category has subcategories. Promote or remove them before turning it into a subcategory.
categories.demoteBlockedBudget: This category has a budget. Delete the budget before turning it into a subcategory.

chat.welcomeBody: Tell me about your transactions and I'll help you record them.
chat.suggestion1: I spent R$ 30 at the bakery
chat.suggestion2: How much do I have on my Nubank account?

audio.permissionDenied: Microphone permission required to record voice.

handlers.errorQuota: The AI service is temporarily unavailable due to rate limits. Please wait a moment and try again.
handlers.errorGeneric: Sorry, I could not process your message. Please try again.
handlers.categoryNotFoundCreateFirst: Category "$name" doesn't exist. If this was a transfer between your accounts, ask for "transfer" explicitly; otherwise create the category first.
handlers.transferAccountsRequired: Transfer needs both source and destination accounts.
handlers.transferMinTwoAccounts: Transfer requires at least two accounts.
handlers.transferSourceDestSame: Source and destination must be different accounts.
handlers.transferCreated: Transfer of $amount from "$from" to "$to" created successfully!
handlers.budgetCategoryRequired: A category is required for the budget.
handlers.budgetCategoryNotFoundCreate: Category "$name" doesn't exist. Create it first.
handlers.budgetExpenseOnly: Budgets are only available for expense categories.
handlers.budgetRootCategoryOnly: Budgets can only be set on root categories. Use the root "$name".
handlers.budgetAlreadyExists: There's already a budget for "$name". Use "update" to change the value.
handlers.budgetDoesNotExist: No budget for "$name" yet. Use "create" to define one.
handlers.budgetAmountPositive: Budget amount must be greater than zero.
handlers.resolveAccountMissing: Which account should I use? Please tell me the account name.
handlers.resolveAccountNotFound: Account "$query" not found. Please create it first or use the exact name.
handlers.resolveAccountMultiple: Multiple accounts match "$query": $names. Please be more specific.

budgets.title: Budgets
budgets.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this budget?
budgets.duplicateCategory: There's already a budget for this category.
budgets.noExpenseCategory: Create at least one expense category first.
budgets.allCategoriesBudgeted: All categories already have a budget.
budgets.emptyBody: Set a monthly cap per expense category. Financo tracks how much you've spent, how much is left, and warns you upfront when you're about to go over.
budgets.emptyExample: Ex: R$ 1,500 on Food, R$ 400 on Leisure, R$ 200 on Transport.
budgets.importCsvIntroBody: Your file must follow the expected format (columns Category, Amount). Each row maps to a root expense category by name; categories that don't exist or already have a budget are skipped. Download the example to see how it works.
budgets.importCsvSuccess: Imported $imported budgets. Skipped $skipped (unknown or duplicate category).

profile.title: Profile
profile.signOutConfirm: Are you sure you want to sign out?
profile.clearDataDescription: Delete transactions, chat, categories and accounts
profile.clearDataConfirmBody: All your transactions, accounts, categories, budgets, bills and chat history will be erased. This cannot be undone.
profile.downloadApkDescription: Install the mobile version on your Android device
profile.masterPanelDescription: Manage users and the access allowlist

startup.errorBody: We couldn't finish setting things up. Please try again.

investments.title: Investments
investments.pendingBannerSubtitle: Tell us where this money is invested.
investments.allocationEmpty: No allocations yet. Create classes and log holdings to see the breakdown.
investments.orphanBanner: Maintenance: $count orphan holding(s) excluded from totals.
investments.emptyNoAccountMessage: Before declaring where your money is allocated, add an Investment-type account. It becomes the ceiling your classes split.
investments.emptyNoClassesMessage: Create buckets that match how you split your investments. Each class carries the target (%) you want — the page compares actual against target.
investments.emptyNoClassesExample: E.g. ARCA — Stocks 25% · REITs 25% · Crypto 25% · Bonds 25%
investments.targetHelper: Share of total wealth you want allocated to this class.
investments.targetSubclassHelper: Share of the parent class this subclass should represent.
investments.classRowNoSubclasses: No subclasses yet — tap to add one.
investments.detailNoSubclassesBody: Subclasses are where money is actually allocated (e.g. Apple, Tesla). The class organises the group.
investments.subclassSuggestionAdd: Add $amount to reach the suggested target
investments.subclassSuggestionNoTarget: Set a target % to see a suggestion
investments.deleteClassConfirm: Linked holdings must be reassigned or removed first. Continue?
investments.deleteHoldingConfirm: This holding will be removed from the breakdown. The account balance is not affected.
investments.notesHint: Optional details (e.g. CDB Banco Inter, matures 2028)
investments.fabAddHoldingSubtitle: Tell us how a slice of the balance is invested.
investments.fabAddHoldingNoSubclass: Add a subclass before allocating — classes are organisers only.
investments.allocationExceedsBalance: Allocation exceeds the available balance on this account ($available).
investments.targetSumExceedsRoot: Target percent sum exceeds 100% for root classes. Available: $available.
investments.targetSumExceedsSub: Target percent sum exceeds 100% for subclasses of this class. Available: $available.
investments.targetPercentOutOfRange: Target percent must be between 0 and 100.
investments.subclassCannotBeParent: A subclass cannot be the parent of another subclass.
investments.classCannotBeOwnParent: A class cannot be its own parent.
investments.classOwnsSubclasses: This class owns subclasses — remove or re-parent them before turning it into a subclass.
investments.deleteBlockedBySubclasses: Can't delete: $count subclass(es) still reference this class.
investments.deleteBlockedByHoldings: Can't delete: $count holding(s) still reference this class.
investments.holdingAccountNotInvestment: Holdings can only be attached to investment accounts.
investments.holdingRequiresSubclass: Holdings must point at a subclass. Add a subclass to the chosen class first.

payablesReceivables.empty: No movements found in this period.
payablesReceivables.noExpenseCategory: Create at least one expense category first.
payablesReceivables.noIncomeCategory: Create at least one income category first.
